useEffect(()=>{if(!mapRef.current)return;fetch('/WorldMap_SVG_Source.normalized.svg').then(res=>res.text()).then(svgContent=>{if(!mapRef.current)return;mapRef.current.innerHTML=svgContent;const svg=mapRef.current.querySelector('svg');if(!svg)return;svg.setAttribute('width','100%');svg.setAttribute('height','100%');svg.setAttribute('preserveAspectRatio','xMidYMid slice');svg.style.display='block';// Dark theme: ocean bg handled by CSS, countries are dark with subtle borders
svg.querySelectorAll('path').forEach(path=>{path.style.fill='#1e3a5f';path.style.stroke='#2d5a8e';path.style.strokeWidth='0.4';});// Highlight visited countries in bright teal

const ns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';const vb=svg.viewBox.baseVal;const overlay=document.createElementNS(ns,'g');overlay.setAttribute('class','flight-overlay');// Flight routes: [startX%, startY%, endX%, endY%]

{x1:0.72,y1:0.42,x2:0.85,y2:0.35,color:'#8b5cf6'},// India -> Japan

{x1:0.30,y1:0.65,x2:0.54,y2:0.50,color:'#ec4899'}// Brazil -> Africa
];routes.forEach((r,i)=>{const x1=vb.x+r.x1*vb.width;const y1=vb.y+r.y1*vb.height;const x2=vb.x+r.x2*vb.width;const y2=vb.y+r.y2*vb.height;const mx=(x1+x2)/2;const my=Math.min(y1,y2)-Math.abs(x2-x1)*0.15;// Arc path
const arc=document.createElementNS(ns,'path');arc.setAttribute('d',`M${x1},${y1} Q${mx},${my} ${x2},${y2}`);arc.setAttribute('fill','none');arc.setAttribute('stroke',r.color);arc.setAttribute('stroke-width','2');arc.setAttribute('opacity','0.4');arc.setAttribute('stroke-dasharray','8 6');const animDash=document.createElementNS(ns,'animate');animDash.setAttribute('attributeName','stroke-dashoffset');animDash.setAttribute('values','0;-28');animDash.setAttribute('dur',`${1.5+i*0.3}s`);animDash.setAttribute('repeatCount','indefinite');arc.appendChild(animDash);overlay.appendChild(arc);// Moving dot along the path
const dot=document.createElementNS(ns,'circle');dot.setAttribute('r','4');dot.setAttribute('fill',r.color);dot.setAttribute('opacity','0.9');const animMotion=document.createElementNS(ns,'animateMotion');animMotion.setAttribute('dur',`${3+i*0.5}s`);animMotion.setAttribute('repeatCount','indefinite');animMotion.setAttribute('path',`M${x1},${y1} Q${mx},${my} ${x2},${y2}`);dot.appendChild(animMotion);overlay.appendChild(dot);// Pulsing city dots at endpoints
